regions.text: Let's use a scale of one million years—the time since humans began. (Diagram: A line representing 1,000,000 years).
(Diagram: A complexity graph showing the emergence of 'SPEECH' as a key turning point). This curve shows the steps into complex living.
Speech made us human. It developed slowly and gave us control over the world and ourselves. Language grew alongside the parts of the brain used for talking.
speech: spoken language. human: distinct from animals. FUTURE: will speak. PRESENT: speak(s). PAST: spoke, spoken.
